title: Iceage Detail New Album, ‘For Love Of Grace & The Hereafter’

The post
full_text:
Iceage Detail New Album, ‘For Love Of Grace & The Hereafter’
 
 

 

It's the band's first full-length release since 2021's Seek Shelter
 
 

 
 

Photo by Alvade Febvre
 
 
 
 

Iceage have shared details of a new album, titled For Love Of Grace & The Hereafter.

Spanning 12 tracks, the follow-up to 2021’s Seek Shelter arrives off the back of the unveiling of the single ‘Star’ last month, which features on the new album. The LP was produced and mixed by the band together with Danish artist Nis Bysted at Silence Studio, in rural Sweden near the Norwegian border, last year.

“The songs needed to be immediate, urgent, raw, and fast,” said frontman Elias Rønnenfelt in a statement. “We wanted to try to shed any unnecessary weight. Catching outlets of energy is what excites us the most.”

To mark the announcement of For Love Of Grace & The Hereafter, Iceage have shared a new song, ‘Ember’, for which you can watch a video below.

Mexican Summer will release For Love Of Grace & The Hereafter on 29 May 2026.
